title: ScoringOutput
description: Structured output the Claude scorer must return for each response. Validated before a ScoringRecord is written (Principles II & VII).

sentiment_score.description: -1.0 strongly negative toward our therapy .. +1.0 strongly positive; 0.0 neutral.

citation_status.description: WRONG_INDICATION = the model returned content for the wrong disease/indication.

brand_mentions.description: Brand/competitor names detected in the response text.

key_claims.description: Up to five key claims the model made about the therapy.
